mapper.sql: SELECT d.diary_id, d.user_id, u.nickname AS author_nickname, d.title, d.diary_date, d.mood_id, d.created_at, d.updated_at, s.dirty, s.analysis_status, s.content_hash, s.content_updated_at, s.last_marked_at, s.last_analyzed_at, s.active_analysis_id, s.last_error_code, s.last_error_message, s.updated_at AS state_updated_at, la.analysis_id AS latest_analysis_id, la.analysis_version AS latest_analysis_version, la.status AS latest_analysis_status, la.is_active AS latest_analysis_active, la.summary_text AS latest_summary_text, la.error_code AS latest_error_code, la.error_message AS latest_error_message, la.started_at AS latest_started_at, la.finished_at AS latest_finished_at, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_diary_event de WHERE de.diary_id = d.diary_id AND de.is_active = 1 ) AS event_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_diary_trait_evidence dte WHERE dte.diary_id = d.diary_id AND dte.is_active = 1 ) AS evidence_count FROM tb_diary d INNER JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = d.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_diary_analysis_state s ON s.diary_id = d.diary_id LEFT JOIN tb_diary_analysis la ON la.analysis_id = ( SELECT x.analysis_id FROM tb_diary_analysis x WHERE x.diary_id = d.diary_id ORDER BY x.analysis_version DESC, x.analysis_id DESC LIMIT 1 )
mapper.select: ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC, d.diary_id DESC LIMIT #{request.offset}, #{request.size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_diary d LEFT JOIN tb_diary_analysis_state s ON s.diary_id = d.diary_id

SELECT event_id, analysis_id, diary_id, user_id, event_type, event_title, event_summary, emotion, emotion_intensity, people_json, places_json, activities_json, relationship_json, causality_json, pattern_candidate_json, confidence, evidence_text, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_diary_event WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY confidence DESC, event_id ASC

SELECT evidence_id, analysis_id, diary_id, user_id, trait_key, signal_score, confidence, evidence_text, reason_json, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_diary_trait_evidence WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY confidence DESC, evidence_id ASC

SELECT analysis_id, diary_id, user_id, analysis_version, status, is_active AS active, content_hash, diary_updated_at_snapshot, binding_id, system_template_id, user_template_id, runtime_profile_id, raw_response_json, summary_text, error_code, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_diary_analysis WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} ORDER BY analysis_version DESC, analysis_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_diary_analysis_state SET content_updated_at = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR), updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND dirty = 1 AND analysis_status = 'DIRTY'
